title: "runFinalizersOnExit" Should Not Be Called
description: Using "runFinalizersOnExit" can lead to erratic behavior and deadlocks when the application exits. This is because finalizers might be called on live objects while other threads are simultaneously manipulating them. A safer alternative is to attach a shutdown hook.
recommendation: Replace the use of "runFinalizersOnExit" with a shutdown hook.
impact: Using "runFinalizersOnExit" can lead to unpredictable app behavior and deadlocks, negatively affecting code quality and potentially security.

checks.message: Replace the use of "runFinalizersOnExit" with a shutdown hook.
